creator: Rebecca Bellan
title: (No AI) Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
content: Runway no longer wants to be just another AI model company. It wants to become the infrastructure layer for generative media. On Thursday, the startup launched Runway Media Router through Runway Dev, its developer platform, released earlier this month, that provides API access to a growing roster of third-party image, video and audio models alongside \[…\]

title: (No AI) OpenAI is making big claims as it rolls out ChatGPT Health to everyone
author: Emma Roth
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/07/chatgpt-health-launch.webp?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

OpenAI is [rolling out ChatGPT Health](https://openai.com/index/health-in-chatgpt/) to everyone in the US on Thursday, allowing more people to connect their medical records and health-tracking information to the chatbot. During a briefing, Ashley Alexander, OpenAI's vice president of health product, says the company's models "are now capable of reasoning at levels that are better than clinician level."

When asked for more information about how the performance of OpenAI's models stacks up against human clinicians, OpenAI health lead Karan Singhal says that he would "temper" the claim that they are reasoning at better levels, but that "there have been individual studies that have been poi …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/970115/openai-chatgpt-health-launch-claims)

When asked for more information about how the performance of OpenAI's models stacks up against human clinicians, OpenAI health lead Karan Singhal says that he would "temper" the claim that they are reasoning at better levels, but that "there have been individual studies that have been poi …

title: (No AI) Lawmakers prepare bill requiring AI ‘kill switch’
author: Emma Roth
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/02/STK_414_AI_C-1.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Lawmakers are preparing to introduce an "AI Kill Switch Act" that would require AI companies to shut down or throttle their systems on orders from the Department of Homeland Security, [according to a report from _Politico_](https://www.politico.com/news/2026/07/23/house-ai-kill-switch-bill-unveiled-as-openai-hack-raises-alarms-01008898). Reps. Ted Lieu (D-CA) and Nathaniel Moran (R-TX) are expected to introduce the legislation on Thursday.

The news of the proposed bill follows [OpenAI's admission that its AI systems mistakenly hacked](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/968988/openai-hugging-face-hack-ai) Hugging Face during an internal evaluation. The bill says that, after consultation with the Secretary of Commerce and the Director of National Intelligence (DNI), the DHS would have the ability to order AI companies to shut down …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/969939/lawmakers-ai-kill-switch-proposal)

Reps. Ted Lieu (D-CA) and Nathaniel Moran (R-TX) are expected to introduce the legislation on Thursday.
The news of the proposed bill follows OpenAI's admission that its AI systems mistakenly hacked Hugging Face during an internal evaluation. The bill says that, after consultation with the Secretary of Commerce and the Director of National Intelligence (DNI), the DHS would have the ability to order AI companies to shut down …
Read the full story at The Verge.

creator: Boone Ashworth
title: (No AI) Remember Jibo? Its Successor Is a Wearable That Turns Your Life Into AI Slop
dc:creator: Boone Ashworth
content: With “blessings” from the original Jibo founders, iKairos is a wearable or desk-mounted “AI journal” that turns your family moments into AI images and video.

title: (No AI) The White House Is Trying to Figure Out What to Do About Chinese AI
